aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and relevant content, but lacks depth in user engagement features and review generation.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to collect and display customer reviews.
Enhance content with location-specific keywords and service details.
Add more detailed FAQ sections to address common customer queries.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has some localized content and mentions of service areas, but lacks structured GBP (Google Business Profile) optimization.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has potential for local search optimization but needs to improve its GBP to capture more local search traffic.
critical_issues: No active Google Business Profile found.
Lack of localized content targeting specific neighborhoods or regions in DC, Maryland, and Northern Virginia.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across the web, which could be affecting local search visibility.
action_items: Audit and update all online directories and listings with consistent NAP information.
Claim and verify the business in major local directories and citation sites.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema for the business.
Missing Service schema for detailed service listings.
No Review schema to display customer testimonials.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of user-generated content and engagement features.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for detailed service information or customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review collection system and adding structured data for services.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, localized content and engaging with local communities to build online authority.

business_name: Fry Plumbing, Heating And Air Conditioning Corp.
